description: Strict 4-action Breakout fs4/stack4 L1 seed search: 7 models x Breakout/Flickering x 5 seeds, 1M, recoverable
notes: Dependency chain: 58907588 (4-action parameter match) -> 58907589 (GaWF smoke, 25k steps) -> 58907590 (formal 70-task array). Each stage is afterok-gated.

First recoverable Atari array: --replay_backing mmap, --checkpoint_interval_steps 50000, --requeue, --signal=B:USR1@120. A preempted unit checkpoints, self-requeues via scontrol, and resumes with its replay buffer intact.

Concurrency capped at 12 (--array=0-69%12) because each running unit holds up to ~28 GB of mmap replay against a 1 TiB /scratch soft quota; peak ~336 GB over the ~372 GB already stored. A per-task quota guard refuses to start below 3x headroom.
Breakout minimal action space is 4 actions, not Pong 6, so it uses its own parameter-match table at results/atari_param_match_breakout_fs4_stack4_l1.
L2 (5 models x 50 tasks) deliberately not submitted: the quota headroom is reserved for L1 replay buffers.
Recovery path validated beforehand on GPU by job 58890853.
